summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Constitution page with tab navigation, expandable sections, and content verification. All major features working correctly.

Tab navigation works between Constitution and Merchant Covenant tabs

Article II displays G5 GOLD Currency details including $13.00/hour rate and 33-hour milestones

100% Transparency Mandate section displays non-negotiable requirements
What You Receive section shows benefits for advertisers including 100% Human Verified, No KYC Population, Pre-Funded Customers, Demographic Data, Engagement Timing, Location Data
Weekly Competition section shows 1st/2nd/3rd place prizes (4 days/2 days/1 day exclusive ad placement)
